## edu-cli teacher apply

Apply to join a class as a teacher (教师申请加入班级)

```
edu-cli teacher apply [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --class-id uint    Class ID (required)
  -h, --help             help for apply
      --message string   Optional message to the admin
```
